# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff` and workspace status. The only changed files are `.ralph-burning/projects/9ni911-1/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/9ni911-1/run.json`, which are explicitly out of scope for review. No milestone CLI implementation files were changed, so there are no actionable correctness/safety/robustness findings in this patch.

## Amendments

None.
